name: pensieve
description: Memory and instruction optimizer for Claude Code — diagnose, fix, and prevent the behavioral degradation that accumulates over time

skills.name: audit
skills.description: Full diagnostic: memory health, CLAUDE.md quality, cross-project duplication — everything that might be degrading Claude's behavior

skills.name: optimize
skills.description: Apply all fixes: memory consolidation, CLAUDE.md restructuring, cross-project rule promotion

skills.name: diagnose
skills.description: Mine session transcripts for frustration patterns, infer user persona, compare with existing memories

skills.name: capture
skills.description: Structured feedback capture with drift prevention — What/Why/When/Exceptions before writing

skills.name: seed
skills.description: Proactively install anti-frustration rules based on user profile — vaccination instead of waiting for problems

skills.name: harden
skills.description: Convert repeatedly-violated rules into mechanical hooks — escalate from soft memory to hard enforcement
